summary: Tested Admin 2FA Login & B2B Management features. Fixed critical bug in admin_b2b.py that was looking for sessions in wrong MongoDB collection. All 25 backend tests pass. B2B API endpoints (orders, vouchers, credit notes, self-pickup) are fully functional.

fixed.issue: Admin B2B router had local require_admin function that checked 'admin_sessions' collection, but sessions are stored in 'user_sessions'
fixed.fix: Removed local require_admin function and imported shared require_admin from dependencies.py
fixed.root_cause: The admin_b2b.py had a duplicate require_admin function that used wrong collection

Admin 2FA Login Flow.POST /api/admin/login/initiate: PASSED - Initiates 2FA, stores token in MongoDB admin_2fa_tokens collection
Admin 2FA Login Flow.POST /api/admin/login/verify-otp: PASSED - Verifies OTP, creates session, returns session_token
Admin 2FA Login Flow.Token Storage in MongoDB: VERIFIED - Tokens stored in admin_2fa_tokens with TTL index (auto-cleanup)
Admin 2FA Login Flow.Invalid credentials: PASSED - Returns 401 for wrong PIN, 403 for non-admin email
Admin 2FA Login Flow.Wrong OTP: PASSED - Returns 401 with remaining attempts counter
Admin 2FA Login Flow.Legacy endpoint: PASSED - Returns 400 with message to use new 2FA flow

B2B Management Endpoints (all require ad.GET /api/admin/b2b/orders: PASSED - Lists B2B orders with status counts and pagination
B2B Management Endpoints (all require ad.PUT /api/admin/b2b/orders/{order_id}/sta: PASSED - Updates order status with history
B2B Management Endpoints (all require ad.POST /api/admin/b2b/vouchers: PASSED - Creates retailer voucher (auto-generates code if empty)
B2B Management Endpoints (all require ad.POST /api/admin/b2b/credit-notes: PASSED - Creates credit note for retailer
B2B Management Endpoints (all require ad.GET /api/admin/b2b/credit-notes: PASSED - Lists credit notes with summary
B2B Management Endpoints (all require ad.GET /api/admin/b2b/credit-notes/reasons: PASSED - Returns valid CN reasons list

Frontend Admin B2B Page.Route /admin/b2b: CONFIGURED - AdminB2BPage component at correct route
Frontend Admin B2B Page.Sidebar Navigation: CONFIGURED - 'B2B Wholesale' item added to navItems in AdminLayout.jsx
Frontend Admin B2B Page.Tabs Component: IMPLEMENTED - Orders, Vouchers, Credit Notes, Self-Pickup tabs

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Admin 2FA tokens stored in MongoDB with TTL index for auto-cleanup
✓ B2B endpoints properly protected with admin authentication
✓ MongoDB ObjectId (_id) excluded from API responses
✓ Voucher codes auto-generated if not provided
✓ Credit notes have 45-day expiry with email notification
✓ B2B page has data-testid attributes on interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Created test voucher RV-36833E (15% off, max ₹1000, min order ₹5000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin 2FA login and B2B Management features are fully functional. Fixed critical bug where admin_b2b.py was checking wrong MongoDB collection for sessions. All B2B endpoints work correctly when authenticated. Frontend B2B page (AdminB2BPage.jsx) has 4 tabs: Orders, Vouchers, Credit Notes, Self-Pickup. The sidebar navigation includes 'B2B Wholesale' item. To test frontend manually: login via admin login page, then navigate to /admin/b2b.

rca_of_issue.bug_description: B2B endpoints were returning 'Invalid session' even with valid session token
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The admin_b2b.py router had its own local require_admin() function that was checking the 'admin_sessions' MongoDB collection, but the actual sessions created by create_session() were being stored in the 'user_sessions' collection
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Removed the local require_admin function from admin_b2b.py and imported the shared require_admin from dependencies.py which correctly validates sessions from user_sessions collection
rca_of_issue.verification: After fix, all B2B endpoints work correctly with valid admin session tokens
